concerns.analysis: Multiple meaningful images from the source document are missing or incorrectly rendered in the HTML output. Specifically, in the 'Collaboration' section (corresponding to Slide 8) and the 'Power Automate Flows' section (Slide 21), the meaningful icons and graphics are replaced by green placeholder squares. Additionally, the QR code on the 'NC DIT Innovation Summit Follow-Up' page (Slide 24) is entirely absent from the rendered output. These are significant visual content omissions.
